headline: ESET enters a strategic partnership with NATO alongside leading industry partners
summary: TALLIN, Estonia, May 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ESET is proud to announce that it is joining a strategic partnership with NATO alongside Microsoft and Palo Alto Networks. This collaboration is an important step to strengthen collective resilience in cyberspace in the face of present and emerging cyber threats. headline: Palo Alto Networks Turns AI Security Wins Into Real World Tests
summary: Palo Alto Networks expanded its AI native cyber defense offerings, highlighting the Prisma AIRS 3.0 AI agent gateway as a core application layer tool against advanced threats. Unit 42 Managed XSIAM is being used by Intrado to protect mission critical 9-1-1 and emergency response operations, showing direct use in high stakes environments. The company is deepening partner relationships, with AccessIT Group enabled to deliver next generation firewall platforms to customers. Palo Alto Networks...
